positive: A striking, minimalist celestial landscape featuring a crescent moon entwined with luminous cosmic flora and constellations. The main subject is a vibrant, stylized nebula pattern centered on a deep indigo background, contrasted by brilliant gold foil accents and ethereal teal glows. The composition is symmetrical and highly detailed, designed for maximum impact on fabric. Style: Neo-Art Deco meets Astrological Minimalism. Lighting: Dramatic rim lighting on the flora, simulating starlight. Color Palette: Deep Indigo, Nebula Teal, Brilliant Gold, Cosmic Violet. Print-friendly details: Clean, sharp vector lines, strong silhouette, suitable for screen printing or direct-to-garment application.
negative: blurry, lowres, amateur, noise, grainy, artifacts, bad anatomy, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, poor composition, copyright, messy, realistic photography
